chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-61 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case 1.For orders on o/objection 2.For hearing of main case 13-02-2025 Miss Fahmeeda Mirani, Advocate along with applicant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Today, applicant Mst. Asma Waseer is present along with three minors babies, namely, Urooj, Irfa and Ayat.Allthe kids seem happy with their mother/applicant; therefore, temporary custody is being handed over to the applicant; however, both the parties shall be at liberty to approach the proper forum under G&W Act for resolution of permanent custody of minors. The respondent No.6 Muhammad Arif, father of three minors is called absent. However, he has a right to meet his children fortnightly at the residence of applicant at U.C-19 Waseer Mohalla, New Pind, Sukkur, where she resides with her parents. Whenever, applicant feels uncomfortable with regard to custody of minors she may approach the SSP, Sukkur immediately. SSP, Sukkur is under legal obligation to provide protection to the applicant lady and her kids. With these observations, instant Crl. Misc. Application is disposed of. JUDGE Ahmad
